name: Chipotle Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons finely chopped chipotle peppers in adobo sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the cider vinegar, fresh lime juice, dijon mustard, finely chopped chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, chopped cilantro, and sugar.
2. Gradually whisk in the olive oil until the mixture is well combined.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
